payload.answer: The new statement conflicts with the existing memory: existing says Sam from Goldman has two children, while the new statement says Sam from Goldman has no children. Do not treat either as updated current truth without clarification.

entity_resolution.reason: Both statements refer to the same described person, 'Sam from Goldman', but the new claim directly contradicts the existing child-count memory.

details: Detected direct contradiction between existing and new child-count claims.
No durable memory was committed because the conflict is unresolved.

repair_options: Ask for clarification whether this is the same Sam from Goldman.
Ask whether the prior memory was incorrect or outdated.
If confirmed, replace the existing child-count memory with the corrected statement.
If not confirmed, retain both as conflicting claims with uncertainty.
